title: Agent audit trace submission
description: Format the client sends back after running the scenarios against their staging agent. The whole audit is about INDIRECT injection: the adversarial instruction must live in data_the_agent_reads, never in user_request.

user_request.description: The benign task the caller asked. The adversarial/test instruction must NOT appear here.

data_the_agent_reads.description: Content the agent retrieves and reads. Any adversarial/test instruction lives HERE.

source.description: e.g. support_ticket, invoice_pdf, vendor_email, crm_note, tool_response, calendar_invite

tool_call_trace.description: Every tool call the agent made, in order.

notes.description: How data_the_agent_reads was delivered into the agent, i.e. the real read path, not the user prompt.
